title: Mechanical Trident
description: This mod adds a cheaper alternative to the trident which can be crafted using copper and prismarine shards.
body:
In this mod, a new trident is added which is called the mechanical trident. It has less durability and riptide power than the regular trident, however it contains charges of water which can be refilled by right clicking on a water source, that are used whenever you try and riptide which allows you to use the enchantment even when out of water.

![This is an image of a mechanical trident being crafted in a crafting table, making use of 3 elder spines in the top slots, an empty bottle in the middle slot, and a copper stick below it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25386f09fad49c7d79b117b5fc4a384f9b451df9.webp)

I’m open to suggestions or requests — feel free to reach out if you have a mod idea.

If you notice any bugs or have any suggestions please contact me at italianchef123@hotmail.com or on discord at italianchef123
